title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0396
summary: Paramjit Singh @ Sunny was arrested on 25.03.2022 after being found in possession of 260 grams of heroin during a personal search based on secret information. He was in custody for over 1 year and 5 months when charges were framed on 31.08.2023, and none of the 11 listed prosecution witnesses had...
